text: Integrate Vapi agent calling as a tool that OpenClaw can call when the user asks to 'call someone'.
Backlog: Provision and integrate a CRM for OpenClaw to manage (features: contacts, deals/pipelines, tasks, email sync, API access, reporting). Add acceptance criteria and integration plan.
Deploy v2 of the Mastra Vault on MacOS
Prepare and release a Windows version of the Mastra Vault
Create a standalone Workspace view with a built-in file editor.
Build an internal Mastra agent that summarizes Pylon tasks and intelligently assigns them to the right users.
Review the client Notion doc before tomorrow's meeting.
Update the readDocs tool to point at the new Mastra PDFs.
Create new vector embeddings for the latest Mastra documentation and refresh the MastraClaw knowledge-base tools.
Add Workspace LSP support for MastraClaw per Paul's blog post.
Post Ashwin's Mongo blog post on Discord.
Investigate the AI NW agent social network opportunity for MastraClaw.
Create Langfuse and Braintrust accounts, then research their capabilities compared to Mastra.
Research the Agent-to-Agent spec and summarize why it matters.
